## [00:00 - 00:58]

So it's a 10-day contact. We've given five days between the last contact. That's not necessary, but I do that to give the client a little breath there and so you don't feel like you're just jumping on him every day. Here it is, 10 days. I want you to invite them to an event. You need to find an event in your area. Something to do with your company or not to do with your company, something that's in line with your brand that's an event offer. It could be specific to your company and or something to a charity, something to the city, something. Be creative now, an event offer. I want to invite you to an event that we're doing. It could be over the next 30 days, 60 days, 90 days. It could be way into the future, but you wanted to make contact to invite them to this event. It's called the 10-day contact event offer. Try it today and try it right now. Check back in with me. The next contact will be at 14 days unless you want to do it sooner.
